content: My friend has a bug where he can't skip the story. He tried restarting the game, but it didn't help. It doesn't work on all levels. The funniest thing is that all the other buttons work. Either this is cutting-edge technology forcing you to read the story, or it's a bug.

This pure Chaos Kathi team with 3 +12 standard units - is not strong enough to beat Wave 1 Alert 4 with the Health Inflation of the past year.

I find this sad as it means beginner players can't level up random teams and must use the OP new units that do a lot of damage. 

Maybe you should look at all the teams you are leaving behind by doubling up the health of enemies in DTides since Kathi was released.

My +12 level 70 Jenkins used to be able to clear Alert 4. She can't any longer. The enemies health is just too high for her.

I know this is important to Light - the HP increase is creating brain drain as a lot of off meta teams are no longer viable.

卡兩天了，學校的家裡的自己的舞蹈教室的網路都用過，沒用，一直卡著。
~~不會是因為我物理不及格就把我退學吧~~

This is just a small QOL change, but I would find useful if we could have the option to go back after we press the Keyflare Rouse option, whiteout being forced to pick one if you then change your mind.
手机（IOS端）玩这个游戏很容易发烫，经常卡死。请优化一下。谢谢
I only see a blank screen when clicking on daily quest. Re-starting makes no difference:
